retrospectives.summary: 31 mistakes analyzed. Protocol violations dominant (5/31). New patterns: PATTERN-014 (batch_skill_invocation_failure, 5), PATTERN-015 (shell_operator_escaping, 3), PATTERN-019 (line_length_violation, 2), PATTERN-020 (mandatory_step_treated_as_optional, 2), PATTERN-021 (skill_output_re_presentation, 2), PATTERN-022 (workflow_rejection_handling, 3), PATTERN-023 (autolearn_false_positive, 2). High-severity open items: A001 (ineffective, validation separation), A020 (ineffective, approval gate).

37 mistakes analyzed. Protocol violations dominant (12/37, 32%). New patterns: PATTERN-023 (autolearn false positives, 2 occurrences), plus 7 recurrences of existing patterns. A020 escalated: implementation was incomplete—hook checks AskUserQuestion was called but does not validate answers are non-empty. M459, M462, M463, M464 all bypass approval gate via empty answers object.
